case_title: ROBERT MORLATT VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-16-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE FEB-27-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST ROBERT MORLATT FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JUN-04-2013, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUN-24-2013. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-04-2013 CONTINUED TO AUG-06-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). ***NOTE: IF THERE IS NO PROOF OF SERVICE, ANSWER OR DEFAULT AND PAYMENT OF OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS BY THE AUG-06-2013 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE, THE COURT INTENDS TO DISMISS THE MATTER. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST ROBERT MORLATT FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: APR-16-2013, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-03-2013. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR APR-16-2013 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-04-2013 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING AUG-06-2013 AT 10:30 AM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
